messages.content: Convert each natural language operations request into exactly one valid OPS DSL line. Return DSL only with no markdown, no explanations, and no extra text.
Backup the configuration files in production on Saturday at 0200Z.
OPS|INTENT=BACKUP|SERVICE="config-files"|ENV="prod"|PRIORITY=LOW|APPROVAL=MANUAL|NOTIFY=YES|WINDOW="MAINTENANCE_SAT_0200Z"|TAGS=["backup","config"]
